name: Smartsheet
auth_notes: Supports OAuth 2.0 for delegated access and personal access tokens (API access tokens) for direct API access. Bearer token authentication is used for the API requests.
access_notes: The Smartsheet API requires a Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management plan. It is not available on free plans.
api_notes: The REST API provides comprehensive CRUD operations for core objects like sheets, rows, columns, reports, and folders, along with webhooks and bulk operations. SDKs are provided for Python, Java, C#, and Node.js.
blocker: API access is restricted to paid Smartsheet plans (Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management).
one_liner: Smartsheet is a work management platform that offers an enterprise-grade API for automating workflows, managing project data, and building custom integrations.
mcp_notes: Smartsheet provides an official MCP server for connecting to AI clients like Claude and Cursor.

evidence.claim: The Smartsheet API provides full programmatic control, including CRUD operations, webhooks, and bulk operations.
The Smartsheet API requires a Business, Enterprise, or Advanced Work Management plan.
Search citation: 5 steps for getting started with the Smartsheet API | Smartsheet
Search citation: What Makes an API Enterprise-Grade? A 5-Dimension Evaluation Framework | Smartsheet
